monitoring.energy_method: Intel RAPL (Running Average Power Limit) energy counters from /sys/class/powercap/

monitoring_graphs.title: CPU Utilization During Run
monitoring_graphs.description: System CPU load and the training process share normalized across all logical cores.

monitoring_graphs.title: Memory Usage During Run
monitoring_graphs.description: Resident memory used by the training Python process.

monitoring_graphs.title: Estimated Power Draw
monitoring_graphs.description: Estimated instantaneous power from CPU load and process memory footprint.

monitoring_graphs.title: Cumulative Estimated Energy
monitoring_graphs.description: Estimated energy accumulated over the monitored run.

monitoring_graphs.title: System Temperature
monitoring_graphs.description: Highest exposed CPU/system temperature sensor sampled during the run.

monitoring_graphs.title: Training Loss Progression
monitoring_graphs.description: Logged training loss across optimizer steps.

monitoring_graphs.title: Evaluation Metrics Per Epoch
monitoring_graphs.description: Held-out test metrics recorded after each epoch.
